name: Shrimp Scampi
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium-high heat.
2. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
3. Dip shrimp in egg and quickly drop into the skillet.
4. Saute the shrimp for 2-4 minutes on each side until cooked through.
5. Add white wine, salt, and pepper. Simmer for an additional minute.
6. Serve over a bed of rice.
